caption: A woman with dark hair and a tan complexion is seen from the chest up, positioned in front of a pale wall and a light-colored curtain. She wears a brown and white vertically striped shirt and a black over-ear headset with an attached microphone. Throughout the sequence, she maintains a steady, forward-facing gaze with a neutral expression, appearing to listen or observe something off-camera. Her head remains relatively still, with only subtle shifts in her facial muscles. In the bottom left corner of each scene, the text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in a small, white font. The lighting and setting remain consistent across the sequence, with no significant changes in her position, clothing, or the surrounding environment.
